name: Jello Flavored Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sugar for whipping egg whites
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, sift together 1-1/4 cups sugar, flour, baking powder, and Jell-O.
2. In a separate bowl, combine milk, oil, and lemon extract.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until the batter is smooth.
4. Gently fold in the yolk mixture until just combined.
5. In a clean mixing bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar to the egg whites and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter until fully incorporated.
7. Grease an 8-inch ring pan with vegetable shortening and dust with flour.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the cake springs back when touched.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for a few minutes before turning out onto a wire rack.
11. Decorate with a thin icing and trim as desired.
12. Serve plain or decorate with fresh fruit slices according to preference.
